briefdescription.para: Creates an uninitialized ImageView handle.

detaileddescription.para: Only derived versions can be instantiated. Calling member functions with an uninitialized Dali::Object is not allowed.

briefdescription.para: Virtual destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: Copy constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
Creates another handle that points to the same real object.
imageView
Handle to copy

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to move

briefdescription.para: Copy assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
Changes this handle to point to another real object.
imageView
Object to assign this to
Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Move assignment operator.

parameterdescription.para: Object to assign this to

simplesect.para: Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Sets the resource URL of the image to display.

detaileddescription.para: The image is loaded asynchronously. Use ResourceReadySignal() to be notified when loading completes.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image resource

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the image currently set on this view

briefdescription.para: Reloads the current image from its URL.

detaileddescription.para: Has no effect if no image URL has been set.

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of a placeholder image shown while the main image is loading.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the placeholder image resource

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the placeholder image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the placeholder image, or an empty string if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the color multiplier applied to the image.

detaileddescription.para: Accepts both direct RGBA values and theme color tokens via UiColor.

parameterdescription.para: The color to multiply with the image

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the color multiplier applied to the image.

simplesect.para: The current image color

briefdescription.para: Sets the pixel area used to display a sub-region of the image.

detaileddescription.para: The area is specified as normalized coordinates: (x, y, width, height) where each component is in the range [0, 1].

parameterdescription.para: The normalized sub-region of the image to display

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the pixel area.

simplesect.para: The current pixel area as normalized coordinates

briefdescription.para: Sets the sampling mode used when scaling the image.

parameterdescription.para: The sampling mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the sampling mode.

simplesect.para: The current sampling mode

briefdescription.para: Sets how the image is fitted within the view bounds.

detaileddescription.para: The default fitting mode is Ui::FittingMode::FILL (stretch to fill).

parameterdescription.para: The fitting mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the fitting mode.

simplesect.para: The current fitting mode (default: FILL)

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired rasterization width as a hint for the image loader.

parameterdescription.para: The desired width in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired rasterization width hint.

simplesect.para: The desired width in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired rasterization height as a hint for the image loader.

parameterdescription.para: The desired height in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired rasterization height hint.

simplesect.para: The desired height in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously at the current view size.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the image is (re)loaded at the view's resolved layout size each time the view size changes. This avoids loading the full-resolution image when only a smaller display size is needed, saving memory and decode time.
Direction: view size → image load size.

simplesect.para: Do NOT use together with aspect-ratio layout on the same ImageView. ImageLoadWithViewSize causes GetNaturalSize to return the current view size instead of the true image dimensions, making aspect-ratio adjustment ineffective.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable loading image with view size

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the image is loaded with the view size.

simplesect.para: True if loading image with view size is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image uses pre-multiplied alpha.

parameterdescription.para: True if the image has pre-multiplied alpha

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether pre-multiplied alpha is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of an alpha mask image.

detaileddescription.para: When set, the alpha channel of the mask image is applied to the main image.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the alpha mask image

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the alpha mask image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the alpha mask image, or an empty string if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image should be cropped to the mask bounds.

parameterdescription.para: True to crop the image to the mask

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether crop-to-mask is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if crop-to-mask is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the masking mode.

parameterdescription.para: The masking mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the masking mode.

simplesect.para: The current masking mode

briefdescription.para: Sets the load policy for the image resource.

detaileddescription.para: Determines whether the image is loaded immediately when the view is created (IMMEDIATE), or deferred until the view is attached to the scene (ATTACHED).

parameterdescription.para: The load policy to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the load policy.

simplesect.para: The current load policy

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy for the image resource.

detaileddescription.para: Controls when the image texture is released from memory.

parameterdescription.para: The release policy to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy.

simplesect.para: The current release policy

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load the image on the main thread synchronously

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether fast-track uploading is enabled.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the image is uploaded to the GPU on a background thread to reduce main-thread stalls.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable fast-track uploading

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether fast-track uploading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if fast-track uploading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether EXIF orientation metadata is applied automatically.

parameterdescription.para: True to apply orientation correction

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether orientation correction is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if orientation correction is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the N-patch border insets.

detaileddescription.para: The border is specified as (left, top, right, bottom) pixel values. Setting a non-zero border activates N-patch rendering.

parameterdescription.para: The border insets as (left, top, right, bottom)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the N-patch border insets.

simplesect.para: The current border as (left, top, right, bottom)

briefdescription.para: Sets whether only the N-patch border regions are rendered.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the center region of the N-patch is not rendered.

parameterdescription.para: True to render only the border regions

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether border-only rendering is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if only the border regions are rendered

briefdescription.para: Sets the depth index of the image visual.

detaileddescription.para: The depth index controls the rendering order of visuals within the same layer. Higher values are rendered on top.

parameterdescription.para: The depth index to assign to the image visual

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current loading status of the image.

simplesect.para: The current ResourceStatus of the image visual

briefdescription.para: Returns the signal emitted when the image has finished loading and is ready to display.

simplesect.para: A reference to the ResourceReady signal

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized ImageView.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized ImageView with a given URL.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image resource to display

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to ImageView handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to an ImageView, the downcast produces a valid handle. If not, the returned handle is left uninitialized.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to an object

simplesect.para: A handle to an ImageView or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: ImageView is a View for displaying an image resource.

detaileddescription.para: It supports a variety of image formats and provides controls for fitting, sampling, masking, loading policy, and N-patch borders.
The image is loaded asynchronously by default. Use ResourceReadySignal() to be notified when the image has finished loading.
